hook: $47 fixed my destroyed couch. Pet hair wipes right off.

aida_breakdown.attention: Close-up of fur-covered, stained sofa — looks like a dog explosion. Dollar amount hits immediately.
aida_breakdown.interest: Wide shot embarrassment framing: guests coming over, couch is the first thing they see. Owner admits avoidance.
aida_breakdown.desire: Live demo: hand wiping clumps of pet hair off the covered couch with one swipe. Liquid poured and beads off.
aida_breakdown.action: Final beauty shot of sleek covered couch with a dog lounging on it. CTA overlay with link-in-bio.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Couch looks brand new — pet hair and liquids wipe off in one swipe, no embarrassment having guests over
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: $47 price shown on screen next to visible before/after in the same reel — tangible, low-risk proof
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: No tools, no sewing, no landlord approval — stretches on like a fitted sheet

scenes.visual_prompt: Extreme close-up of a badly stained, fur-matted gray sofa cushion. Dog hair clumped everywhere. One visible dark liquid stain on the armrest. Harsh natural window light exposing every flaw.
scenes.voiceover: I spent $47 to fix my destroyed couch.

scenes.visual_prompt: Medium shot of the same sofa from across the living room. A woman stands near it looking uncomfortable, arms crossed. The fur and wear are obvious even from distance. Neutral, relatable home setting.
scenes.voiceover: I was embarrassed to have anyone over.

scenes.visual_prompt: Close pan across worn armrests, faded fabric, visible stains. A golden retriever sits on the cushion adding more fur in real time. The couch looks ten years beyond its life.
scenes.voiceover: It looked destroyed. I wasn't buying a new one.

scenes.visual_prompt: Hands smoothing a slate gray stretchy slipcover over the sofa cushion. The fabric pulls taut and snaps into the crevices neatly. No tools visible. Clean, satisfying motion.
scenes.voiceover: This cover goes on in five minutes. No tools.

scenes.visual_prompt: Hand demo split: left side shows clumps of golden dog hair being swept off the covered sofa in one pass. Right side shows water poured on the surface beading up and rolling off. Crisp, high contrast visuals.
scenes.voiceover: I was skeptical. I was wrong. Hair just wipes off.

scenes.visual_prompt: Wide beauty shot of the fully covered sofa looking sleek and uniform. A large fluffy dog lounges comfortably on it. The room looks pulled together. Warm afternoon light.

caption:
$47 fixed my destroyed couch — and now pet hair wipes right off in one pass.

I was embarrassed to have guests over. Fur on everything, stains on the armrest, fabric that looked 20 years old. I wasn't ready to buy a new couch.

This waterproof stretch cover took five minutes. No tools. No drama. I was skeptical it would actually hold up. I was wrong.

Liquid beads off. Hair wipes off. It still looks this good three weeks later.

Everything linked in bio.

#couchcover #petproofcouch #sofaslipcover #dogmom #homehacks

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
